betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§7§oThe mob cannot be damaged through normal ranged and melee weapons (things like Zenith and Kikoku can do damage but will not produce drops). Magic damage, Electroblob spells, the railgun, and other magic weapons will work!

§fAll throughout my journey, I have been alone.
I accepted it, partly because I expected some reward to come at the end. To give me companionship, to give meaning to my loneliness.
But the reward, it was something else. Another fate was awaiting me.
My people are gone. 
Their souls have been taken under someone's wing, but that does not take away the fact that I am probably the last human, and that is something I will have to live with, no matter where my fate will lead me.
I am alone now, but it is because I decided to be.
Despite my self-centeredness, I had companions, allies, throughout this journey.
And it is up to me to look at them, to accept their personhood, and to welcome their companionship.
